name: RectangularCloud
summary: The RectangularCloud class defines a rectangular cloud that is a rectangle with a specific size set for the bulges.

constructors.name: RectangularCloud(ViewBase, Point, Point)
constructors.signature: public RectangularCloud(ViewBase view, Point startPoint, Point endPoint)
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangle cloud instance with two points using standard attributes. Please note that creating a rectangular cloud using two points will re-calculate the start point to correspond with positive widths and heights.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The start point.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: The end point.

constructors.name: RectangularCloud(ViewBase, Point, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public RectangularCloud(ViewBase view, Point startPoint, double width, double height)
constructors.summary: Creates a new RectangularCloud instance with the start point and the defined width and height using standard attributes.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The start point.

params.name: width
params.doc: The width.

params.name: height
params.doc: The height.

constructors.name: RectangularCloud(ViewBase, Point, Point, RectangularCloud.RectangularCloudAttributes)
constructors.signature: public RectangularCloud(ViewBase view, Point startPoint, Point endPoint, RectangularCloud.RectangularCloudAttributes attributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangle cloud instance with two points using the given attributes. Please note that creating a rectangular cloud using two points will re-calculate the start point to correspond with positive widths and heights.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The start point.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: The end point.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: The rectangualr cloud attributes.

constructors.name: RectangularCloud(ViewBase, Point, Double, Double, RectangularCloud.RectangularCloudAttributes)
constructors.signature: public RectangularCloud(ViewBase view, Point startPoint, double width, double height, RectangularCloud.RectangularCloudAttributes attributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangular cloud instance with the start point and the defined width and height using the given attributes.

params.name: view
params.doc: The view.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The start point.

params.name: width
params.doc: The width.

params.name: height
params.doc: The height.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: The rectangular cloud attributes.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: The angle of the rectangular cloud. The rectangular cloud rotates around its start point.

properties.name: ArcWidth
properties.summary: The arc width to use for the cloud base. The property usage follows the below legacy cloud creation rules. In case of positive value then that value will be used. In case of zero value then the positive value of the XS_ARC_WIDTH_OF_CLOUD advance option is used and in case that also the advance option value is 0 then the default legacy 10 value is used. In case of negative value the value is transformed and its positive value is used.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: The attributes for the rectangular cloud.

properties.name: Bulge
properties.summary: The bulge (curve) to use (a bulge is the ratio between the height and width of an object).

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: The end point of the rectangular cloud.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: The height of the rectangular cloud. Changing the height changes the end point with the height.

properties.name: Hideable
properties.summary: Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: The start point of the rectangular cloud. Changing this will move the rectangular cloud.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: The width of the rectangular cloud. Changing the width changes the end point with the width.
